product.name: KAZENTO Cable Vector
product.objective: A modular magnetic cable routing product that holds and redirects cables using printable snap-fit modules and internal magnet slots.

modules.name: magnetic_base_core
modules.description: Main low-profile base with rounded edges and internal cylindrical pockets for magnets.

modules.name: straight_cable_guide
modules.description: Straight cable channel mounted above the base.
modules.print_orientation: Flat on the base contact face.

modules.name: snap_cover
modules.description: Removable top cover that retains the cable inside the guide.
modules.print_orientation: Top face upward, flat underside on bed.

modules.name: angled_redirection_module
modules.description: Angled module for redirecting cable paths in a later iteration.
modules.print_orientation: To be defined after angle is selected.

modules.name: multi_cable_channel_module
modules.description: Wider module for routing multiple cables in parallel.
modules.print_orientation: Flat on the base contact face.

modules.name: modular_snap_interface
modules.description: Reusable snap geometry using the default 0.35 mm clearance.

modules.name: internal_magnet_slots
modules.description: Four internal cylindrical magnet pockets sized 6.2 mm x 2.2 mm for 6 mm x 2 mm magnets.

assumptions: Base corner radius applies to the XY outline only in the first CAD pass.
Magnet pockets are blind holes from the underside of the base.
Straight guide is centered on the base.
First version prioritizes function over decorative styling.
